product_overview: Eman ISchool (Eduverse) is a comprehensive online education platform offering multi-role access for admins, teachers, students, and parents. The platform integrates live virtual classrooms via Google Meet, robust course and lesson management, immersive VR educational experiences, and multi-language support to create a complete digital learning ecosystem.
core_goals: Provide seamless multi-role authentication and role-based access control.
Enable live and scheduled virtual classrooms with Google Meet integration.
Offer comprehensive admin tools for user, course, attendance, and fee management.
Enhance student learning experience with lessons, assignments, chat, and educational reels.
Empower teachers with portals for lesson planning, materials management, chat, and AI-powered educational content creation.
Deliver immersive VR educational experiences featuring science simulations and virtual field trips.
Support exam simulations and readiness assessments for students.
Facilitate parental monitoring through a dedicated dashboard to track child progress.
Ensure multilingual support (Arabic and English) with RTL and LTR layouts.
Implement a scalable notification system supporting email, SMS, push, and in-app alerts.
key_features: Multi-role authentication system supporting Google OAuth and credentials for student, teacher, admin, and parent roles.
Lesson and live meeting scheduling with Google Meet integration for virtual classrooms.
Comprehensive admin dashboard encompassing user management, attendance, lessons, fees, content, quizzes, audit logs, and system settings.
Student portal featuring lesson carousels, subject grids, assignment tracking, chat, and educational short video reels.
Teacher portal including calendar management, material uploads, chat messaging, and AI-driven educational reel generation.
VR Eduverse with immersive science simulations and virtual field trips to Egyptian landmarks using Three.js and WebXR.
Exam simulation system for student practice with scoring and readiness feedback.
Parent dashboard for monitoring children’s course enrollments, grades, attendance, and progress.
Marketing and public-facing pages including landing, about us, blogs, product catalog, and policy pages.
Internationalization with Arabic and English language support and RTL layout adjustments.
Robust notification system delivering alerts through email, SMS, push notifications, and in-app channels with timezone awareness.
Reusable UI component library built on Shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS ensuring consistent styling and accessibility.
API routes for managing courses, users, assignments, enrollments, blogs, and dashboard metrics.
State management powered by Zustand and backend integration using Supabase.
user_flow_summary: Admin logs in via /login/admin and accesses the admin dashboard with KPI stats, user, lesson, attendance, and fee management.
Admins create and manage students, teachers, lessons, and attendance records, generating Google Meet links for live sessions.
Teachers log in on /login/teacher, view their schedule, start live lessons, upload materials, create educational reels, and grade assignments.
Students log in on /login/student, view upcoming lessons via a carousel, join live sessions, submit assignments, watch educational reels, chat with teachers, and update profiles.
Parents log in to /parent-dashboard to track their children’s attendance, grades, course progress, and upcoming lessons.
Users navigate public marketing pages such as landing, about us, blogs, and curriculum pages for Egyptian, Al-Azhar, and national tracks.
All users participate in notification workflows receiving alerts via multiple channels with appropriate timezone handling.
VR users access immersive educational experiences including science modules and virtual field trips through the VR Eduverse.
Role-based redirects ensure users land on their appropriate dashboards, and access controls enforce security across portals.
validation_criteria: Authentication flows successfully redirect users to role-appropriate dashboards upon login with valid credentials, including Google OAuth.
Authorization correctly restricts access to pages and APIs based on user roles, denying unauthorized and unauthenticated access.
Admin dashboard loads with accurate KPI data, and all management pages (students, teachers, lessons, attendance, fees) perform CRUD operations reliably.
Teachers can start live lessons that generate active Google Meet links and update lesson statuses to 'live'.
Students can join live lessons, submit assignments, view grades, and access educational reels with playback and progress tracking.
Parents can view accurate summary data of their children’s academic progress and attendance.
VR experiences load without errors, supporting interactive science simulations and multiple virtual field trips.
The exam simulation system allows students to take practice exams and records results correctly.
Internationalization toggles content between Arabic and English, including correct RTL layout adjustments.
Notification system delivers messages through email, SMS, push, and in-app channels reliably and respects user timezone.
API endpoints validate role-based permissions and handle malformed requests gracefully, returning appropriate HTTP status codes.
UI components render properly across devices with responsive design and accessibility considerations.
System supports concurrency scenarios such as simultaneous lesson joins and handles error cases like expired sessions or invalid inputs appropriately.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Multi-role authentication system with NextAuth supporting Google OAuth and credentials. Supports student, teacher, admin, and parent roles.

features.name: Lesson & Meeting Management
features.description: Scheduling and managing lessons with Google Meet integration for live video classrooms.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Comprehensive admin panel for managing students, teachers, attendance, lessons, fees, content, and system settings.

features.name: Student Learning Experience
features.description: Student portal with lessons carousel, subject grid, assignments, chat, and educational video reels.

features.name: Teacher Portal
features.description: Teacher interface for managing calendar, materials, chat, and AI-powered educational reel generation.

features.name: VR Educational Experiences
features.description: Immersive VR learning experiences using Three.js and WebXR for science simulations and virtual field trips to Egyptian landmarks.

features.name: Exam & Assessment System
features.description: Exam simulation and readiness scoring system for students to practice and assess their knowledge.

features.name: Parent Dashboard
features.description: Parent monitoring dashboard to track child progress and educational activities.

features.name: Curriculum Pages
features.description: Educational curriculum pages for National, Azhar, and Egyptian curriculum tracks.

features.name: Marketing & Public Pages
features.description: Landing page, about us, policies, blogs, and product catalog for marketing purposes.

features.name: Notification System
features.description: Multi-channel notification system supporting email, SMS, and push notifications with timezone handling.

features.name: UI Components Library
features.description: Reusable UI components following Shadcn/ui patterns with Tailwind CSS styling.

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: Multi-language support with Arabic and English using next-intl library.

features.name: State Management
features.description: Application state management using Zustand for cart and session state.

features.name: Supabase Integration
features.description: Database client and utilities for Supabase backend.

features.name: API Routes
features.description: Backend API routes for courses, users, assignments, enrollments, blogs, and dashboard statistics.
